root.sql: select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.description , sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.shareloan_code , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt , (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock + sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt) as share_stock_pending , ((sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock + sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt)*0.8) as share_stock_pending_80 , coalesce(pka_com_function.fp_lon_get_balance_atnow(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no),0) as loan_bal , current_date from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_shareloan_status.shareloan_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code and sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock + sc_mem_m_share_mem.pending_amt) >= '2000000' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '049898' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
